# Contracted Services

## Missing-file default

If this file does not exist in a project, every skill that reads it treats **no
billable add-on as contracted** (web baseline only) — the conservative default.
Run `/project-init` to generate it, or create it manually from this template.

## Canonical service catalog

The following 13 names are the only recognized service identifiers, mirroring the
agency's Services and Packages catalog. Names outside this list are treated as
not contracted and flagged in review output.

- `web`
- `seo`
- `geo`
- `aeo`
- `ai-visibility`
- `cro`
- `analytics`
- `crm-integration`
- `ai-chatbot`
- `ai-follow-up-automation`
- `ai-commercial-proposals`
- `technical-support`
- `growth-strategy`
